text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer's rival for the Satsuki Sho is Mejiro
Ryan. However, Ryan doesn't see her as a threat.
To the contrary, she says Palmer's presence sets
her at ease.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Palmer runs away from her position as the family
mediator and aims to be the person she truly
wants to be.
